rules.description: Migrate production workload on stand-alone virtual machine (VM) to multiple VMs grouped in a Virtual Machine Scale Sets Flex to intelligently distribute across the platform.
rules.fix: Migrate production workload on stand-alone virtual machine (VM) to multiple VMs grouped in a Virtual Machine Scale Sets Flex to intelligently distribute across the platform.

rules.description: Use Azure Capacity Reservation for virtual machine (VM) that runs critical workloads. Azure Capacity Reservations reserve compute capacity in a specific region or availability zone.
rules.fix: Use Azure Capacity Reservation for virtual machine (VM) that runs critical workloads

rules.description: Accelerated networking enables SR-IOV to a VM, greatly improving its networking performance by bypassing the host from the data path, which reduces latency, jitter, and CPU utilization for demanding network workloads on supported VM types.
rules.fix: Accelerated networking enables SR-IOV to a VM, greatly improving its networking performance by bypassing the host from the data path, which reduces latency, jitter, and CPU utilization for demanding network workloads on supported VM types.

rules.description: The v5 VMs provides newer and faster cores, increased networking throughputs, and better global redundancy and availability. Upgrade to the v5 VMs from the v3 or v2 VMs to match or exceed performance at the same cost.
rules.query: where location in ("australiaeast","southeastasia","swedencentral","southafricanorth","koreacentral","canadacentral","francecentral","germanywestcentral","italynorth","norwayeast","polandcentral","spaincentral","switzerlandnorth","mexicocentral","uaenorth","israelcentral","brazilsoutheast") and properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize in ( "Standard_D1_v2", "Standard_D2_v2", "Standard_D3_v2", "Standard_D4_v2", "Standard_D5_v2", "Standard_DS1_v2", "Standard_DS2_v2", "Standard_DS3_v2", "Standard_DS4_v2", "Standard_DS5_v2", "Standard_D11_v2", "Standard_D12_v2", "Standard_D13_v2", "Standard_D14_v2", "Standard_D15_v2", "Standard_DS11_v2", "Standard_DS12_v2", "Standard_DS13_v2", "Standard_DS14_v2", "Standard_DS15_v2", "Standard_D2_v3", "Standard_D4_v3", "Standard_D8_v3", "Standard_D16_v3", "Standard_D32_v3", "Standard_D48_v3", "Standard_D64_v3", "Standard_D2s_v3", "Standard_D4s_v3", "Standard_D8s_v3", "Standard_D16s_v3", "Standard_D32s_v3", "Standard_D48s_v3", "Standard_D64s_v3")
rules.fix: The v5 VMs provides newer and faster cores, increased networking throughputs, and better global redundancy and availability. Upgrade to the v5 VMs from the v3 or v2 VMs to match or exceed performance at the same cost.

rules.description: Migrate D, Ds, Dv2, Dsv2, and Ls series VM instances to newer VM generation instances. D, Ds, Dv2, Dsv2, and Ls series VMs in Azure Virtual Machines are retiring.
rules.fix: Migrate D, Ds, Dv2, Dsv2, and Ls series VM instances to newer VM generation instances. D, Ds, Dv2, Dsv2, and Ls series VMs in Azure Virtual Machines are retiring.

rules.description: Upgrade the operating system (OS) disk from Standard HDD to Standard SSD for increased uptime of single-instance virtual machine and improved input/output operations and throughput.
rules.query: extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState) | extend creationTime = todatetime(properties.timeCreated) | extend osDiskSKU = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType) | extend isEphemeral = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diffDiskSettings) | extend runningState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus) | where provisioningState == "Succeeded" | where osDiskSKU == "Standard_LRS" | where isempty(isEphemeral) | where creationTime < ago(7d) and creationTime > ago(8d)
rules.fix: Upgrade the operating system (OS) disk from Standard HDD to Standard SSD for increased uptime of single-instance virtual machine and improved input/output operations and throughput.

rules.description: Trusted Launch (TL) offers a modern and operational technologies for Azure virtual machines, using Secure Boot, virtual TPM, and guest attestation. This Generation 2 VM(s) have an opportunity to upgrade to Trusted Launch. Ensure this VM(s) has both an image and VM size that it is TL compatible.
rules.query: extend hyperV = tostring(properties['extended']['instanceView']['hyperVGeneration']) | extend security_type = tostring(properties['securityProfile']['securityType']) | where hyperV == "V2" | where security_type != "TrustedLaunch" | where security_type != "ConfidentialVM"
rules.fix: Trusted Launch (TL) offers a modern and operational technologies for Azure virtual machines, using Secure Boot, virtual TPM, and guest attestation. This Generation 2 VM(s) have an opportunity to upgrade to Trusted Launch. Ensure this VM(s) has both an image and VM size that it is TL compatible.

rules.description: To avoid service disruptions, migrate workloads to the Azure NVadsA10_v5-series VMs. Azure NVadsA10_v5-series VMs include increased GPU memory bandwidth per GPU, Small AI workloads and GPU accelerated graphics applications, virtual desktops, and visualizations.
rules.fix: To avoid service disruptions, migrate workloads to the Azure NVadsA10_v5-series VMs. Azure NVadsA10_v5-series VMs include increased GPU memory bandwidth per GPU, Small AI workloads and GPU accelerated graphics applications, virtual desktops, and visualizations.

rules.description: Migrate workloads from virtual machine (VM) to Virtual Machine Scale Sets Flex for deployment across zones or within the same zone across different fault domains.
rules.fix: Migrate workloads from virtual machine (VM) to Virtual Machine Scale Sets Flex for deployment across zones or within the same zone across different fault domains.

rules.description: Virtual machines are resilient to regional outages when replication to another region is enabled. To reduce adverse business effect during an Azure region outage, the platform recommends enabling replication of all business-critical virtual machines.
rules.fix: Virtual machines are resilient to regional outages when replication to another region is enabled. To reduce adverse business effect during an Azure region outage, the platform recommends enabling replication of all business-critical virtual machines.

rules.description: Migrate production workload from A-series or B-series virtual machine (VM) to D-series or better VM. A-series and B-series VMs are designed for entry-level workloads.
rules.query: where properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize contains 'Standard_B' or properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize contains 'Standard_A'
rules.fix: Migrate production workload from A-series or B-series virtual machine (VM) to D-series or better VM. A-series and B-series VMs are designed for entry-level workloads.

rules.description: To avoid service disruptions, migrate workloads to Azure NVads_V710_v5-series virtual machines. NVads_V710_v5-series virtual machines provide greater GPU memory bandwidth per GPU for small AI workloads and GPU accelerated graphics applications, virtual desktops, and visualizations.
rules.fix: To avoid service disruptions, migrate workloads to Azure NVads_V710_v5-series virtual machines. NVads_V710_v5-series virtual machines provide greater GPU memory bandwidth per GPU for small AI workloads and GPU accelerated graphics applications, virtual desktops, and visualizations.

rules.description: Azure Virtual Machine (VM) series F, Fs, Fsv2, Lsv2, G, Gs, Av2, and B are retiring. The VM series are no longer available for use or purchase. Applications and workloads currently operating on VM types must be migrated to newer VM series.
rules.query: where tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Lsv2' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_GS' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_G' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Fsv2' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Fs' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_F' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_B' or tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize) startswith 'Standard_Av2'
rules.fix: use or purchase

rules.description: Migrate your data from Azure unmanaged disk storage to managed disks
rules.fix: Migrate your data from Azure unmanaged disk storage to managed disks

rules.description: Add a second instance VM to Availability Set or upgrade to Premium SSD managed disks for highest uptime.
rules.query: where isnotnull(properties.availabilitySet.id) | extend isVMpremiumCapable = iif((tostring(split(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize,'_')[1])) contains "s", 1,0) | extend osDisk = iif(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diffDiskSettings.option == 'Local', 'Ephemeral', properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType) | where tolower(osDisk) contains 'standard' and isVMpremiumCapable == 1
rules.fix: Add a second instance VM to Availability Set or upgrade to Premium SSD managed disks for highest uptime.

rules.description: IP forwarding allows a virtual machine network interface to receive and send network traffic not destined for or originating from its assigned IP addresses.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Test recommendation for Contoso
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Use a Premium SSD managed disk in a Single Instance virtual machine for the highest uptime. Conversion is allowed from a Standard managed disk to a Premium managed disk.
rules.query: where isnull(properties.availabilitySet.id) and isnull(zones) and isnull(properties.host) and isnull(properties.virtualMachineScaleSet) | extend isVMpremiumCapable = iif((tostring(split(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize,'_')[1])) contains "s", 1,0) | extend osDisk = iif(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.diffDiskSettings.option == 'Local', 'Ephemeral', properties.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType) | where tolower(osDisk) contains 'standard' and isVMpremiumCapable == 1
rules.fix: Use a Premium SSD managed disk in a Single Instance virtual machine for the highest uptime

rules.description: When Accelerated Networking is enabled, the default Azure virtual network interface in GuestOS is swapped for a Mellanox, and its driver comes from a 3rd party. Marketplace images have the latest Mellanox drivers, but post-deployment, updating the driver is the user's responsibility.
rules.fix: user's responsibility

rules.description: Workloads running Standard_M192idms_v2 are deleted and associated application data is lost.
rules.fix: Migrate to alternative VM size before retirement

rules.description: To avoid any disruption to your service, we recommend that you change the VM sizing for your workloads from the current Standard_NC24rs_v3 to the newer VM series in the same NC product line.
rules.fix: Migrate to newer NC-series VM

rules.description: Standard_NC24rs_v3 virtual machine size in NCv3-series virtual machines is retiring. Upgrade to the newer VM series in the same NC product line.
rules.fix: Upgrade to newer NC-series VM

rules.description: Workloads running Standard_M192is_v2 are deleted and associated application data is lost.
rules.fix: Migrate to alternative VM size before retirement

rules.description: To avoid any disruption to your service, we recommend that you change the VM sizing for your workloads from the current NCv3-series VMs to the newer VM series in the same NC product line.
rules.fix: Migrate to newer NC-series VM

rules.description: Workloads running Standard_M192ims_v2 are deleted and associated application data is lost.
rules.fix: Migrate to alternative VM size before retirement

rules.description: Workloads running Standard_M192ids_v2 are deleted and associated application data is lost.
rules.fix: Migrate to alternative VM size before retirement
